evals.prompt: Create a single-file HTML page for a VR art gallery called 'ART VR — The Virtual Gallery'. Sidebar with 4 artists (the 4th one, Julian Cross, is selected), a large featured artwork titled 'Vibrant Grove' (2024 · Contemporary), and a thumbnail carousel below it. Dark premium glass style.
evals.expected_output: Dark glassmorphism page matching the reference: red/blue color-bleed background, glass panel layout, numbered nav list with expanded active card, hero media with centered caption, glass carousel with active ring

evals.prompt: Зроби мені темний скляний дашборд для музичного застосунку: зліва список плейлистів, по центру обкладинка поточного треку з назвою, знизу карусель альбомів.
evals.expected_output: Same glass design language generalized to a music app: tokens, glass recipe, letterspaced labels, carousel — but with music content, not a copy of the gallery

evals.prompt: Restyle my landing page hero to look premium and dark, like those frosted-glass visionOS interfaces.
evals.expected_output: Applies the background bleed + glass recipe + typography rules to existing content without rebuilding the gallery layout
